---
title: "Reference for Analyses"
listing:
  id: tasks
  contents: tasks
  type: default
  sort: "title"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title, categories]
---

A cookbook of applied-statistics code snippets accumulated while completing
coursework for an applied-statistics degree. Each **task** is its own page,
tagged with the **course** it came from, so the same content is browsable by
course *and* by task — and fully searchable.

Use the category tags below to filter by course or by task type, or the search
box (top right) to find a specific technique.

::: {#tasks}
:::
